notes: v0.16.85 — Left-nav PCB CLEAN port + on-screen mini-boss diag. Left rail ported from the J1 lab — PCB style in cyberdeck cyan/magenta. Vertical power-trace down the left edge with flowing energy pulses, each row is a plug-in IC chip with: solder pad meeting the trace, lit connector wire, IC notch on top, blinking red activity LED in the top-left corner (out of the label zone), tinted chip body, chromatic-split label on active. MINI-BOSS DIAG: temporary top-of-screen strip that prints PLAYER + BOSS state every frame during BOSS_RUSH (alive / visible / hp / position / z-index / kind). Console also gets a spawn log. Lets us see whether entities exist on what looks like an empty arena — screenshot what the strip shows when blank and the next ship lands the real fix. Windows only.
